base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of brick_block_debris — a effect_layer from 1985 super mario bros. 4 fragments fly outward in X pattern (upper-left / upper-right / lower-left / lower-right). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 4-frame brick-shatter debris — 4 fragments fly outward in X pattern (upper-left / upper-right / lower-left / lower-right); each sub-chunk is 8×8 NES-tile quarter of the brick; rotates in arc as it falls off-screen
